news.title: Exide Industries invests ₹100 Cr in Exide Energy Solutions, raising total investment to ₹4,352.2 Cr.
news.summary: Exide Industries invests ₹100 Cr in Exide Energy Solutions, raising total investment to ₹4,352.2 Cr.

news.title:
Exide Industries invests Rs. 100 crore in subsidiary EESL via rights issue.
Funds to support greenfield lithium-ion battery manufacturing plant, retaining 100% shareholding.
news.summary:
Exide Industries invests Rs. 100 crore in subsidiary EESL via rights issue.
Funds to support greenfield lithium-ion battery manufacturing plant, retaining 100% shareholding.

news.title:
Exide Industries aims for a 150 bps gross margin expansion via cost optimization, operational efficiencies, and pricing strategies.
The company plans to expand globally, ship lithium-ion cells to OEMs, and benefit from growing demand in EV, solar, and industrial segments.
news.summary:
Exide Industries aims for a 150 bps gross margin expansion via cost optimization, operational efficiencies, and pricing strategies.
The company plans to expand globally, ship lithium-ion cells to OEMs, and benefit from growing demand in EV, solar, and industrial segments.

news.title: Exide shares rise nearly 5% after Nomura upgrades to 'buy' rating.
news.summary: Exide shares rise nearly 5% after Nomura upgrades to 'buy' rating.

news.title:
Exide Industries expects lithium-ion margins lower than lead acid trade but higher than lead acid OEM.
Q3 FY26 EBITDA margin at 11.7%, up 220 basis points due to volume growth and cost efficiency.
news.summary:
Exide Industries expects lithium-ion margins lower than lead acid trade but higher than lead acid OEM.
Q3 FY26 EBITDA margin at 11.7%, up 220 basis points due to volume growth and cost efficiency.

news.title:
Exide Industries plans lithium-ion cell shipments to PV, two-wheeler OEMs by FY end or next year.
Three-wheeler and e-rickshaw cells expected to drive initial revenue for Exide Industries.
news.summary:
Exide Industries plans lithium-ion cell shipments to PV, two-wheeler OEMs by FY end or next year.
Three-wheeler and e-rickshaw cells expected to drive initial revenue for Exide Industries.

news.title:
Exide Industries anticipates strong export growth next year with new market opportunities.
The company targets a 100-150 basis points EBITDA margin boost, dependent on LME prices.
news.summary:
Exide Industries anticipates strong export growth next year with new market opportunities.
The company targets a 100-150 basis points EBITDA margin boost, dependent on LME prices.

news.title:
Exide Industries forecasts growth in Q4 FY26, driven by demand.
Lead acid business sees positive outlook in automotive, solar, power backup.
news.summary:
Exide Industries forecasts growth in Q4 FY26, driven by demand.
Lead acid business sees positive outlook in automotive, solar, power backup.

news.title:
Nomura upgrades Exide to 'Buy' with a target price of ₹398.
Q3 EBITDA meets estimates; auto segment grows, industrial recovery expected.
news.summary:
Nomura upgrades Exide to 'Buy' with a target price of ₹398.
Q3 EBITDA meets estimates; auto segment grows, industrial recovery expected.

news.title:
Exide Industries anticipates Rs 400-500cr export boost from Europe tie-up and Indo-US trade deal.
Exide plans Rs 1,400cr investment in lithium-ion batteries, targeting Rs 25,000cr revenue by 2030.
news.summary:
Exide Industries anticipates Rs 400-500cr export boost from Europe tie-up and Indo-US trade deal.
Exide plans Rs 1,400cr investment in lithium-ion batteries, targeting Rs 25,000cr revenue by 2030.

news.title:
Exide Industries uploaded the Q3 FY25-26 earnings call audio on its website.
The company confirmed no unpublished price-sensitive information was shared during the call.
news.summary:
Exide Industries uploaded the Q3 FY25-26 earnings call audio on its website.
The company confirmed no unpublished price-sensitive information was shared during the call.

news.title:
Exide did not take any price hikes in Q3 but implemented one in January.
Further stage-wise price hikes depend on macroeconomic conditions, per management.
news.summary:
Exide did not take any price hikes in Q3 but implemented one in January.
Further stage-wise price hikes depend on macroeconomic conditions, per management.

news.title:
Exide Industries announces an exclusive partnership with a European company.
The strategic move aims to enhance Exide's operations and market position in Europe.
news.summary:
Exide Industries announces an exclusive partnership with a European company.
The strategic move aims to enhance Exide's operations and market position in Europe.

news.title:
Exide plans to ramp up supplies post new tariff announcements, as per management.
This update was shared during a recent conference call by the company.
news.summary:
Exide plans to ramp up supplies post new tariff announcements, as per management.
This update was shared during a recent conference call by the company.

news.title: Exide Industries reports weak Q3 performance in telecom and export sectors.
news.summary: Exide Industries reports weak Q3 performance in telecom and export sectors.

news.title:
Exide Industries reports flat performance for Dec 2025 quarter, improving from prior negative trend.
Stabilised revenue growth persists, but margin pressures and low ROCE highlight challenges in auto components.
news.summary:
Exide Industries reports flat performance for Dec 2025 quarter, improving from prior negative trend.
Stabilised revenue growth persists, but margin pressures and low ROCE highlight challenges in auto components.

news.title:
Exide Industries posted a 5% Q3 profit rise due to tax cuts boosting automaker sales.
Shares rose 0.7% post-results, though weaker exports partially offset growth.
news.summary:
Exide Industries posted a 5% Q3 profit rise due to tax cuts boosting automaker sales.
Shares rose 0.7% post-results, though weaker exports partially offset growth.

news.title:
Exide reports 25% YoY growth in auto OEM business with market share gains.
The company achieved a healthy margin of 11.7% driven by volume growth.
news.summary:
Exide reports 25% YoY growth in auto OEM business with market share gains.
The company achieved a healthy margin of 11.7% driven by volume growth.

news.title:
Exide Industries MD reports record high prices for silver, copper, sulphur, and tin.
These price surges are causing significant cost pressures for the company.
news.summary:
Exide Industries MD reports record high prices for silver, copper, sulphur, and tin.
These price surges are causing significant cost pressures for the company.

news.title:
Exide Industries' Q3 EBITDA rose to 4.7B rupees, below the 4.8B estimate.
EBITDA margin remained stable at 11.65% compared to 11.64% YOY.
news.summary:
Exide Industries' Q3 EBITDA rose to 4.7B rupees, below the 4.8B estimate.
EBITDA margin remained stable at 11.65% compared to 11.64% YOY.
